title: iberis neglecta
intro: Iberis neglecta, commonly known as dwarf candytuft, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Iberis neglecta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Iberis neglecta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional due to potential interactions or allergic reactions.
